issue.name: Insecure direct object references
issue.issueBackground: The fictional portal exposes invoice objects by predictable identifiers.
issue.remediationBackground: Enforce object-level authorization for every invoice lookup.

requestresponse.request:
GET /api/invoices/12345?customer=alice HTTP/1.1 Host: portal.example.test Authorization: Bearer should-not-persist Cookie: session=should-not-persist
password=should-not-persist

issue.name: Missing security header
issue.issueBackground: The fictional application omits a defensive browser header on one page.
issue.remediationBackground: Set the appropriate browser security header on this route.
